ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion entry */,
  "footlength_inch" REAL /* Foot length in inches */,
  "eur_size" INTEGER /* European (EUR) shoe size */,
  "us_size" REAL /* United States (US) shoe size */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* United Kingdom (UK) shoe size */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the size conversion (e.g., Europe, North America, UK) */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., Men's, Women's, Kids) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Men's, Women's, Kids) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product (e.g., Leather, Canvas) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Product image */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier (e.g., manufacturer, distributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sale occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_conversion ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales rep, customer service) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size conversion entry
Region for the size conversion (e.g., Europe, North America, UK)
Type of size (e.g., Men's, Women's, Kids)
Category of the product (e.g., Men's, Women's, Kids)
Material of the product (e.g., Leather, Canvas)
Unique identifier for each inventory entry
Quantity of the product in stock
ID of the location where the sale occurred
ID of the user who made the sale
Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales rep, customer service)
Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered)
